belier.intro: The Moon returns to your own sign today, a decisive shift after three days moving through quieter, more inward territory. Saturn and Neptune retrograde continue in your first house, but this homecoming Moon injects fresh momentum into the identity work you have been doing privately. The Leo Sun in your fifth house adds warmth and a touch of playfulness to your renewed drive.
belier.love: You feel more like yourself today, and a partner notices the shift immediately. Let your renewed energy invite them in rather than rushing past them.
belier.work: The quiet groundwork from recent days is ready to become visible action today. Take the first bold step rather than continuing to prepare.
belier.energy: Your fire reignites today with the Moon back in your sign. Use the surge for something that has been waiting for your initiative.
belier.intuition: Saturn and Neptune retrograde continue to soften the line between your feelings and others', but today's fresh energy makes your own instincts easier to distinguish. Trust the impulse that feels unmistakably yours.
belier.mantra: I return to myself and move forward with confidence.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon moves into Aries in your twelfth house today, a more active energy than recent days but still oriented toward private processing. Saturn and Neptune retrograde continue their work in this same hidden territory, and today's fierier Moon may bring a sudden insight rather than a gradual one. The Leo Sun in your fourth house keeps home a steady anchor as inner work intensifies briefly.
taureau.love: A realization about a relationship may arrive suddenly today rather than gradually. Give yourself a moment before reacting to whatever surfaces.
taureau.work: Behind-the-scenes work takes on new urgency today. Finish something you have been quietly circling rather than starting something new.
taureau.energy: Restorative energy continues to matter today, but with more restlessness underneath it than recent days. Channel any agitation into gentle movement.
taureau.intuition: A sudden dream or flash of insight deserves serious attention today. The twelfth house Moon in fiery Aries can deliver clarity abruptly.
taureau.mantra: I let sudden clarity arrive without resisting it.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Moon enters Aries in your eleventh house today, energizing friendships and group involvement after several quieter days. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in this same house continue refining which long-term goals deserve your energy, now with more urgency behind the question. The Leo Sun in your third house keeps communication lively as social energy picks up.
gemeaux.love: A friend may push you toward directness in a relationship today. Consider the nudge seriously, even if it feels uncomfortable at first.
gemeaux.work: Team or community efforts benefit from your renewed initiative today. Propose the idea you have been holding back.
gemeaux.energy: Mental and social energy surges today after the softer mood of recent days. Use it to act rather than only to plan.
gemeaux.intuition: Your sense of which goals still fit sharpens with sudden clarity today. Trust the goal that now feels urgent rather than merely interesting.
gemeaux.mantra: I act on the goal that finally feels urgent.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon moves into Aries in your tenth house today, bringing bold, assertive energy to your career direction after days of gentler reflection. Saturn and Neptune retrograde continue restructuring your definition of success, now with more decisive momentum behind it. The Leo Sun in your own second house steadies your worth as professional ambition sharpens.
cancer.love: A partner may see a more assertive side of you today. Let your ambition be visible rather than softening it out of habit.
cancer.work: Today favors bold professional moves after a period of quieter positioning. Speak up about the direction you actually want.
cancer.energy: A surge of drive arrives today, less familiar to your usual receptive nature but worth using while it lasts.
cancer.intuition: Career instincts sharpen suddenly today. Trust the decisive impulse rather than second-guessing it into softness.
cancer.mantra: I let my ambition be seen without apology.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon enters Aries in your ninth house today, a warmly compatible fire sign that reignites enthusiasm for bigger beliefs and future plans. Saturn and Neptune retrograde continue testing which convictions are truly yours, now with renewed energy behind the inquiry. Your own Sun amplifies this fiery, adventurous mood.
lion.love: A shared belief about the future energizes a relationship today. Say yes to a plan that excites you both.
lion.work: Educational or expansive projects benefit from bold action today rather than further deliberation. Commit to the direction that excites you.
lion.energy: Two fire signs in harmony today create real momentum. Use it for something that requires courage.
lion.intuition: Your conviction about what you truly believe strengthens dramatically today. Trust the certainty that arrives now.
lion.mantra: I commit boldly to what I believe.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon moves into Aries in your eighth house today, bringing sudden intensity to matters of shared resources and emotional depth. Saturn and Neptune retrograde continue dissolving illusions in this zone, now with a sharper, more urgent quality than recent days. The Leo Sun in your twelfth house keeps private feeling active beneath today's more assertive undercurrent.
vierge.love: An emotionally charged conversation about trust or shared resources may arise suddenly today. Meet it directly rather than retreating into analysis.
vierge.work: A financial matter that has been simmering may demand a decision today. Trust that you now have enough information to act.
vierge.energy: Intensity replaces the gentler mood of recent days. Channel it into a focused, single task rather than scattering it.
vierge.intuition: A sudden, sharp insight about a shared financial or emotional matter deserves attention today. Do not dismiss it as overreaction.
vierge.mantra: I meet sudden clarity with courage, not avoidance.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Moon enters Aries in your seventh house today, bringing partnership dynamics into sharper, more direct focus after several softer days. Saturn and Neptune retrograde continue testing whether a partnership rests on real respect, now with a more confrontational energy available. The Leo Sun in your eleventh house keeps friendship warm even as one-on-one dynamics intensify.
balance.love: Directness serves a relationship better than diplomacy today. Say the thing you have been softening for days.
balance.work: A negotiation benefits from more assertiveness today than your usual style prefers. Trust that clarity will not damage the relationship.
balance.energy: Confrontational energy arrives today, unfamiliar but useful. Use it to resolve rather than avoid tension.
balance.intuition: Your read on a partnership sharpens suddenly today. Trust the direct impression over the diplomatic interpretation.
balance.mantra: I choose directness over diplomacy today.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Moon moves into Aries in your sixth house today, energizing daily routine and health matters with sudden motivation after a gentler stretch. Saturn and Neptune retrograde continue dissolving illusions about sustainable habits, now with more urgency behind the correction. The Leo Sun in your tenth house keeps professional matters visible as daily energy sharpens.
scorpion.love: A shared daily habit may need direct discussion today rather than quiet tolerance. Bring it up plainly.
scorpion.work: A work habit that has needed changing for a while can finally shift today with a burst of decisive energy.
scorpion.energy: Sharp, motivated energy replaces recent gentleness today. Use it for a task requiring real initiative.
scorpion.intuition: Your body signals grow suddenly more insistent today. Whatever it has been quietly saying deserves immediate attention now.
scorpion.mantra: I act decisively on what my body has been telling me.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Moon enters Aries in your fifth house today, a joyfully compatible fire sign that reignites creative and romantic momentum. Saturn and Neptune retrograde continue asking which pursuits deserve real commitment, now answered with more confidence and energy. The Leo Sun in your ninth house keeps larger beliefs warm as personal expression surges.
sagittaire.love: Romantic boldness serves you well today. Make the move you have been considering rather than waiting for a better moment.
sagittaire.work: A creative project benefits from decisive action today rather than further revision. Trust what you have built and share it.
sagittaire.energy: Two fire signs align beautifully today, creating a genuine surge of enthusiasm and courage.
sagittaire.intuition: Creative instincts arrive with unusual confidence today. Trust the bold idea rather than the cautious one.
sagittaire.mantra: I act boldly on my creative impulses today.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Moon moves into Aries in your fourth house today, bringing sudden energy to home and family matters after a gentler stretch. Saturn, your ruling planet, retrograde in your third house continues to demand precise communication, now applied to a more urgent domestic conversation. The Leo Sun in your eighth house keeps shared resources a live topic as home takes center stage.
capricorne.love: A direct conversation about home or family with a partner may finally happen today. Trust that clarity here strengthens rather than threatens the bond.
capricorne.work: Home-based matters may require quick, decisive action today rather than continued patience. Handle what needs handling.
capricorne.energy: Sudden domestic energy arrives today. Use it to complete a task around the house that has been waiting for momentum.
capricorne.intuition: Instincts about family patterns sharpen suddenly today. Trust the clear read over the cautious interpretation.
capricorne.mantra: I bring decisive clarity to matters of home today.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon moves into Aries in your third house today, energizing communication and everyday thinking after a gentler few days in Pisces. Pluto retrograde continues its deep transformation of identity from your first house, while Saturn and Neptune retrograde in this same third house keep thought precise even as expression turns bolder. The Leo Sun in your seventh house brings partnership warmth to today's sharper mental energy.
verseau.love: Direct, honest conversation serves a relationship particularly well today. Say the thing you have been circling with new confidence.
verseau.work: Written or verbal communication benefits from boldness today rather than further polishing. Send the message you have been drafting.
verseau.energy: Mental energy sharpens into something quick and decisive today, well suited to fast, clear action.
verseau.intuition: Your instincts about a conversation or plan arrive with unusual speed and confidence today. Trust the fast read.
verseau.mantra: I speak with new boldness and trust the clarity it brings.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Moon moves into Aries in your second house today, bringing sudden energy to questions of money and self-worth after several days at home in your own sign. Saturn and Neptune retrograde, with Neptune ruling you directly, continue their long work from your twelfth house, but today's fierier Moon injects new confidence into material matters. The Leo Sun in your sixth house grounds you in routine as your sense of worth sharpens.
poissons.love: A conversation about shared resources may need more directness today than the softness of recent days allowed. Speak plainly about what security means to you.
poissons.work: A financial decision benefits from decisive action today rather than continued reflection. Trust the clarity you have gathered.
poissons.energy: A burst of assertive energy arrives today, less familiar but genuinely useful. Use it to claim what you are worth.
poissons.intuition: Your sense of your own material worth sharpens suddenly today. Trust the confident read over the hesitant one.
poissons.mantra: I claim my worth with new and sudden confidence.
poissons.author: Sibylle
